prose:
**Benzaldehyde Fukui-reactivity result** — Property: condensed Fukui indices from Mulliken charges. Method used: DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz` (14 atoms); this Fukui calculation used the supplied coordinates as input. Neutral state: charge 0, multiplicity 1; cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Partial-charge scheme: Mulliken (PySCF). The tool reported `integrity.trustworthy = true`. No warnings were reported by the tool result.

Headline result: most electrophilic site = atom 3 (C), **f+ = 0.3993896**. Most nucleophilic site = atom 1 (O), **f− = 0.23839906**.

Reproducibility: exact command reported by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpnbi1yrni/live.json`. Plot file: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-051848_benzaldehyde_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. The returned result JSON did not include a live `.out` log path, so I am not inventing one.
